name: canon-conversations
description: Coding-agent-first integration workflows for Canon conversational agents.

api_base_url.title: API base URL
api_base_url.description: Canon Conversational API base URL. Use the production API URL or a local runtime URL.

agent_reference.title: Default agent reference
agent_reference.description: Optional default agent_id or agent_slug to use in integration examples.

channel_key.title: Default channel key
channel_key.description: Optional stable channel key, for example production-dashboard-chat.
